name: smart-vs-mcp
description: Workspace-aware stdio wrapper for Visual Studio MCP HTTP endpoints.

interface.shortDescription: Route VS-MCP by workspace instead of hardcoded ports
interface.longDescription: smart-vs-mcp is a workspace-aware stdio wrapper for Visual Studio MCP. It reads per-workspace .mcp settings, resolves the correct VS-MCP HTTP endpoint, and proxies MCP traffic without hardcoded ports.
defaultPrompt: Use smart-vs-mcp to diagnose the Visual Studio MCP endpoint for this workspace.
Configure this workspace to use smart-vs-mcp instead of a hardcoded VS-MCP port.
